title: fregirardia dumetorum
intro: Fregirardia dumetorum, also known as the 'thorny mountain mint' or 'thorny mountain tea', is a perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting immune function. Fregirardia dumetorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
